nodes.label: Skill Scopes: Frontend, Backend, Fullstack, Build-Release
Activation Gate: Ask Scope Before Editing
Workflow: Identify Scope/Platform → Locate Similar Code → Apply Conventions → Update Related Layers

Fullstack Checklist: TauriCommand Enum, Wrapper, invokeWithErrorHandler
Build/Release Checklist: pnpm Scripts, No .rules Changes
Build/Release Commands: pnpm install, tauri:dev, tauri:build, check, test:run, commit
Secrets Policy: .env.local for Tokens, Never Commit Secrets
Tech Stack: Tauri v2, Rust, Vue 3, Vite 7, TypeScript, Pinia, UnoCSS, Naive UI, Vant, SeaORM, SQLite
Code Conventions: 2-Space Indent, LF, Composition API, UnoCSS, storeToRefs
Common Files: Router, TauriCommand Enum, tauriCommand.ts, TauriInvokeHandler, variable.scss
Tauri Command End-to-End Flow: Rust #[tauri::command] → Enum → TypeScript Wrapper → invokeWithErrorHandler
Fullstack Touch Points: command/, lib.rs, enums/index.ts, tauriCommand.ts, TauriInvokeHandler.ts
Backend Command Locations: command/ (Shared), desktops/ (Desktop), mobiles/ (Mobile)
Command Registration: #[tauri::command], mod.rs Export, generate_handler! in lib.rs
SeaORM: Entities in entity/, Migrations in migration/
Shared State: tauri::State<'_, AppData>, Async for IO/DB
Frontend File Placement: views/, components/, layout/, router/, stores/, services/, hooks/, utils/
Pinia Patterns: Setup-Style defineStore, storeToRefs, persist: true
Styling: UnoCSS Utilities, variable.scss Tokens, bg-[--token] Syntax
Routing and i18n: router/index.ts, locales/, t(...) References
Pinia Store Template: defineStore + StoresEnum + Setup-Style
Tauri Command TypeScript Template: TauriCommand Enum + invokeWithErrorHandler
Tauri Command Rust Template: #[tauri::command] + async fn + Result
Repo Root Detection: package.json + src/ directory check
HuLa Light Theme Sidebar Detail Page
HuLa Light Theme Three-Panel Contacts Page
HuLa App QR Code for Distribution
Third-Party App Reference with Gold Bottom Bar
Chat Screen with Sidebar Contact Panel
Rich Media Chat with Images and Colored Bubbles
Dark Modal Overlay or Dark Mode Card UI
Settings or Profile Screen with Minimal Content
Screen with Dark Media Content or Image Gallery
HuLa IM Chat and Media Features (img3 Series)
Group QR Code Save and Forward (v3.0.8)
WebSocket Auto Message Sync after Reconnection (v3.0.5)
Tauri Plugin hula iOS Platform Notes
Android UI Debug via Chrome inspect
AIChat Project Team Roster and Roles
Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct v2.0
AGENTS.md: HuLa Project Context for AI Agents
GEMINI.md: HuLa Project Context for Gemini/Cursor
Tauri Dev Caveats (Rust 1.88+, Linux deps, localhost:5210 blank page)
Tauri Design Rationale: Lightweight, Secure, Low Resource
CSS Variable Strategy (per-element UnoCSS, promote semantic tokens to variable.scss)
Coding Rule: Delete unused variables, no underscore prefix
Tauri Design Rationale: Security-first, minimal resource consumption
Vue 3 Rationale: Composition API, TypeScript integration, mobile optimization
TypeScript Rationale: Catch errors during development, better editor support
Android Multi-ABI Rationale: Maximize coverage and compatibility
Qiniu Chunked Upload Rationale: Resumable, better success rate, network optimization
Documentation Goals: 30-min onboarding, unified management, reduced communication risk
Team Communication Protocol (send_message for short, docs for long content)
Collaboration Rhythm (Daily kanban, post-review doc update, pre/post-release checklist)
Youdao and Tencent API Keys in local.yaml

links.source_location: main interface shows chat as primary view
large 2144px width typical of sidebar+content layout
same dimensions 2144x1664, both primary desktop views, same dark theme
emoji picker is a sub-feature of chat messaging
group chat is a conversation type within messaging
message features demonstrated within chat context
large 2144px width typical of sidebar+content layout
1904x1904 square aspect may indicate a modal dialog not full layout
both show settings UI at different levels (global vs personal)
settings UI likely uses card-based layout per modern IM design
color analysis: dark=True, dark with blue tint
theme switching produces the light mode shown in img_8
color analysis: header avg (89,115,121) muted blue-green
color analysis: light theme, white dominant - demonstrates theme toggle
README styles all previews with border-radius, suggesting rounded card design
emojis are sent within chat messages
group chat is a type of messaging
chat views use sidebar+content layout pattern
dark theme is the default of the theme system
blue headers appear primarily in dark-themed screenshots
large 2144px width typical of sidebar+content layout
